title_zh: GAIA-2 推进可控驾驶世界模型
description_en: Wayve positions GAIA-2 as a more controllable and scalable driving world model for synthetic data generation and evaluation.
description_zh: Wayve 将 GAIA-2 定位为更可控、可扩展的驾驶世界模型，用于合成数据生成与评测。
why_it_matters: Driving world models are shifting from demos toward infrastructure for data generation and validation.
